message:
🐛 fix(deploy,gitops): address nine deploy/gitops reliability issues (#5964)

- #5950 ListDrifts now returns cached drift results populated by DetectDrift
  (TTL 30s) instead of always returning an empty list.
- #5951 Recompile gh-aw workflows onto v0.67.4 (latest stable) — actions-lock
  was still pinned to v0.62.1/v0.67.1.
- #5952 GitOps refresh now re-runs drift detection in addition to refetching
  cluster data; previously it only updated lastUpdated.
- #5953 Apps default to the first available cluster instead of empty string
  so the cluster filter no longer hides every app the moment a user picks
  a cluster.
- #5954 Deployments dashboard filters deploymentIssues and podIssues by the
  same cluster selection as the deployments list so stats are consistent.
- #5955 Deployment status now requires updatedReplicas == replicas (in
  addition to available/ready) so partial rollouts show as pending instead
  of incorrectly running.
- #5956 ProgressDeadlineExceeded and ReplicaFailure conditions surface as
  Failed with reason/message; mission logs prepend the failure header.
- #5957 Deploy API validates sourceCluster — rejects empty, invalid, or
  unknown clusters with a clear 400.
- #5958 Deploy missions treat workload NotFound as an immediate terminal
  failure instead of waiting out the "pending" threshold.
- #5959 Invalid YAML in GitOps drift detection returns a structured 422
  with the parse error details instead of a generic internal error.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
